text: Are you between ages 16-75?
Do you weigh 50kg or more?
Will you be driving a public or heavy-duty vehicle, working on scaffolding or using power tools in the next 24 hours?
Will you be sky diving, deep-sea diving, flying an aeroplane or mountaineering in the next 3 days?
Will you be participating in a major sporting event (e.g. full marathon or cycling race over 100 km) in the next 7 days?
Will you be having a surgical procedure in the next 6 weeks?
Have you taken any painkillers, anti-inflammatories or aspirin (including Ecotrin) in the past 3 days?
Have you had a cold, flu, sore throat, fever, infection, open wound or allergies, in the last 7 days?
Have you been to the dentist in the last 7 days?
Have you had acupuncture, Botox or dry needling in the last 7 days?
Have you had diarrhoea or vomiting that lasted more than 24 hours, within the last 30 days?
Have you had an immunisation or vaccination, in the last 30 days?
Have you taken any medication (including traditional medication) by mouth or injection, in the past 3 months?
Have you been admitted to hospital or had a surgical procedure performed in a doctor's room, in the past 3 months?
Have you taken part in a drug trial, vaccine trial, or clinical research, in the past year?
Have you used any medication for the treatment of acne, epilepsy, hair-thinning, prostate problems, rheumatoid arthritis or anticoagulation (blood-thinning), in the past 2 years?
Have you ever had heart (e.g. stents), lung or circulatory problems (e.g. clots) or a bleeding disorder?
Have you ever had convulsions (fits), epilepsy or strokes?
Have you ever had cancer, skin cancer (melanoma, basal cell carcinoma, squamous cell carcinoma) or leukaemia?
Have you ever had diabetes, asthma, tuberculosis (TB) or kidney disease?
Have you ever had any other serious illnesses, severe allergic reactions, tropical diseases or used medication not mentioned before?
Has your doctor advised you to donate blood to treat a medical condition such as high iron, 'thick blood', polycythaemia or haemochromatosis?
Have you had yellow jaundice, hepatitis, liver disease or tested positive for hepatitis after 1 year of age?
In the past 3 months, have you been in sexual contact or lived with anyone who has hepatitis (jaundice)?
Has you or your sexual partner travelled outside South Africa in the last 3 months?
Have you had malaria in the past 3 years?
Have you been in a malaria area in the past 3 months?
Did you grow up in a malaria area or country (including Zimbabwe, Botswana or Swaziland)? If 'yes', have you been in any malaria area in the past 3 years?
Are you pregnant or undergoing fertility treatment?
In the past 3 months have you had a baby, miscarriage or abortion?
Are you breastfeeding?
Have you ever tested positive for HIV?
Have you ever tested positive for syphilis?
In the past 3 months have you had a tattoo, any piercings, wet cupping or had permanent make-up applied?
In the past 3 months, have you had Raatib, ritual scarring, ritual circumcision, been stabbed or taken part in blood sharing?
In the past 3 months, have you had a needlestick or skin penetrating injury, eye splash or skin contact with another person's blood?
In the past 3 months have you or your sexual partner had a blood transfusion or received any type of blood product?
In the past 3 months have you or your sexual partner used recreational/party/street drugs by nose, mouth or injection?
In the past 3 months have you or your sexual partner injected yourself or been injected with bodybuilding drugs?
In the past 3 months have you or your sexual partner used antiretroviral (ARV) medication as treatment for HIV or to prevent contracting HIV (i.e. PrEP or PEP)?
In the past 3 months have you or your sexual partner had any sexually transmitted disease (STD) including genital herpes, gonorrhoea (drop) or human papilloma virus?
In the past 3 months (with or without a condom): Have you had sexual contact with a new person?
In the past 3 months (with or without a condom) have you had sexual contact with more than one person?
In the past 3 months (with or without a condom) has your sexual partner had sexual contact with more than one person?
In the past 3 months (with or without a condom) have you had sexual contact with a person who has tested HIV positive?
In the past 3 months (with or without a condom) have you had sexual contract with a person who takes money, drugs or other favours for sex?
In the past 3 months (with or without a condom) have you received money, drugs or other favours for sex, or are you a sex worker?
In the past 3 months (with or without a condom) have you been sexually assaulted?
